title: bulbostylis zeyheri
intro: Bulbostylis zeyheri, also known as the Zeyher's club rush, is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Bulbostylis zeyheri include the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction, and is often consumed as a tea or used topically as a poultice to harness its medicinal properties.
